<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin/convert-cp-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 227 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--sling-feature-converter:convert-cp"></a>

# sling-feature-converter:convert-cp

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin:1.0.12:convert-cp

**Description**:

Converts the given Content Packages into Feature Models and places the converted Content Package into the local Maven Repository

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<apiRegions>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--apiregions) | `List<String>` | `-` | Specify the API Regions that the generated feature is made part of **User Property**: `apiRegions` |
| [`<artifactIdOverride>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--artifactidoverride) | `String` | `-` | If set to `true` the Content Package is strictly validated. **User Property**: `artifactIdOverride` |
| [`<bundleStartOrder>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--bundlestartorder) | `int` | `-` | If set to `true` the Content Package is strictly validated. **Default**: `20` **User Property**: `bundleStartOrder` |
| [`<contentPackages>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--contentpackages) | `List<ContentPackage>` | `-` | List of Content Packages to be converted **User Property**: `packages` |
| [`<convertedCPOutput>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--convertedcpoutput) | `File` | `-` | Target directory for the Converted Content Package file **Default**: `${project.build.directory}/cp-conversion` **User Property**: `convertedContentPackageOutputDirectory` |
| [`<exportToApiRegion>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--exporttoapiregion) | `String` | `-` | Specify the API Region to export all exported packages to, if not specified packages will not be added to the api-regions extension. **User Property**: `exportToApiRegion` |
| [`<filterPatterns>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--filterpatterns) | `List<String>` | `-` | Regex based pattern(s) to reject content-package archive entries. **User Property**: `filterPatterns` |
| [`<fmOutput>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--fmoutput) | `File` | `-` | Target directory for the converted Content Package Feature Model file **Default**: `${project.build.directory}/cp-conversion/fm.out` **User Property**: `featureModelsOutputDirectory` |
| [`<fmPrefix>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--fmprefix) | `String` | `-` | System Properties to hand over to the Content Package Converter **User Property**: `fmPrefix` |
| [`<installConvertedCP>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--installconvertedcp) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the converted Content Package will be installed in the local Maven Repository **Default**: `true` **User Property**: `installConvertedContentPackage` |
| [`<isContentPackage>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--iscontentpackage) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the module is handled as Content Package **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `isContentPackage` |
| [`<mergeConfigurations>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--mergeconfigurations) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the OSGi Configurations with same PID are merged. **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `mergeConfigurations` |
| [`<repoSession>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--reposession) | `RepositorySystemSession` | `-` | No description. **Default**: `${repositorySystemSession}` |
| [`<strictValidation>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--strictvalidation) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the Content Package is strictly validated. **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `strictValidation` |
| [`<systemProperties>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--systemproperties) | `List<String>` | `-` | System Properties to hand over to the Content Package Converter **User Property**: `cpSystemProperties` |

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--apiregions"></a>

### <apiRegions>

Specify the API Regions that the generated feature is made part of

- **Type**: `java.util.List<java.lang.String>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `apiRegions`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--artifactidoverride"></a>

### <artifactIdOverride>

If set to `true` the Content Package is strictly validated.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `artifactIdOverride`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--bundlestartorder"></a>

### <bundleStartOrder>

If set to `true` the Content Package is strictly validated.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `bundleStartOrder`
- **Default**: `20`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--contentpackages"></a>

### <contentPackages>

List of Content Packages to be converted

- **Type**: `java.util.List<org.apache.sling.cpconverter.maven.mojos.ContentPackage>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `packages`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--convertedcpoutput"></a>

### <convertedCPOutput>

Target directory for the Converted Content Package file

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `convertedContentPackageOutputDirectory`
- **Default**: `${project.build.directory}/cp-conversion`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--exporttoapiregion"></a>

### <exportToApiRegion>

Specify the API Region to export all exported packages to, if not specified packages will not be added to the api-regions extension.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `exportToApiRegion`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--filterpatterns"></a>

### <filterPatterns>

Regex based pattern(s) to reject content-package archive entries.

- **Type**: `java.util.List<java.lang.String>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `filterPatterns`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--fmoutput"></a>

### <fmOutput>

Target directory for the converted Content Package Feature Model file

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `featureModelsOutputDirectory`
- **Default**: `${project.build.directory}/cp-conversion/fm.out`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--fmprefix"></a>

### <fmPrefix>

System Properties to hand over to the Content Package Converter

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `fmPrefix`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--installconvertedcp"></a>

### <installConvertedCP>

If set to `true` the converted Content Package will be installed in the local Maven Repository

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `installConvertedContentPackage`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--iscontentpackage"></a>

### <isContentPackage>

If set to `true` the module is handled as Content Package

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `isContentPackage`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--mergeconfigurations"></a>

### <mergeConfigurations>

If set to `true` the OSGi Configurations with same PID are merged.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `mergeConfigurations`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--reposession"></a>

### <repoSession>

No description.

- **Type**: `org.eclipse.aether.RepositorySystemSession`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `${repositorySystemSession}`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--strictvalidation"></a>

### <strictValidation>

If set to `true` the Content Package is strictly validated.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `strictValidation`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo--systemproperties"></a>

### <systemProperties>

System Properties to hand over to the Content Package Converter

- **Type**: `java.util.List<java.lang.String>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `cpSystemProperties`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin/convert-pm-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 228 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--sling-feature-converter:convert-pm"></a>

# sling-feature-converter:convert-pm

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin:1.0.12:convert-pm

**Description**:

Converts the given list of Provisioning Models into Feature Models

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<inputFolder>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--inputfolder) | `File` | `-` | The folder that contains the Provisioning Models **User Property**: `inputFolder` |
| [`<outputFolder>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--outputfolder) | `String` | `-` | The folder that will contain the created Feature Models relative to the Maven Basedir Folder **Default**: `target/features` **User Property**: `outputFolder` |

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<artifactId>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--artifactid) | `String` | `-` | If provided this becomes the Feature's Artifact Id. Tis will also make the original name to become the classifier **User Property**: `artifactId` |
| [`<excludeBundles>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--excludebundles) | `List<String>` | `-` | List of Bundles to be excluded from the Feature Model files **User Property**: `excludeBundles` |
| [`<frameworkProperties>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--frameworkproperties) | `List<String>` | `-` | Franework Properties to be added to a given Feature Model. The format looks like this: 'launchpad:felix.systempackages.substitution=true' where launchpad is the name of the PM **User Property**: `frameworkProperties` |
| [`<groupId>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--groupid) | `String` | `-` | If provided this becomes the Feature's Group Id **User Property**: `groupId` |
| [`<noProvisioningModelName>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--noprovisioningmodelname) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the converted Content Package will be installed in the local Maven Repository **Default**: `true` **User Property**: `noProvisioningModelName` |
| [`<runModes>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--runmodes) | `List<String>` | `-` | List of all Runmodes that are considered for this conversion The default and all parts of all runmodes listed are placed into the Feature Models, all others are excluded **User Property**: `runModes` |
| [`<version>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--version) | `String` | `-` | If provided this becomes the Feature's Version **User Property**: `version` |

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--artifactid"></a>

### <artifactId>

If provided this becomes the Feature's Artifact Id. Tis will also make the original name to become the classifier

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `artifactId`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--excludebundles"></a>

### <excludeBundles>

List of Bundles to be excluded from the Feature Model files

- **Type**: `java.util.List<java.lang.String>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `excludeBundles`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--frameworkproperties"></a>

### <frameworkProperties>

Franework Properties to be added to a given Feature Model. The format looks like this: 'launchpad:felix.systempackages.substitution=true' where launchpad is the name of the PM

- **Type**: `java.util.List<java.lang.String>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `frameworkProperties`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--groupid"></a>

### <groupId>

If provided this becomes the Feature's Group Id

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `groupId`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--inputfolder"></a>

### <inputFolder>

The folder that contains the Provisioning Models

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **User Property**: `inputFolder`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--noprovisioningmodelname"></a>

### <noProvisioningModelName>

If set to `true` the converted Content Package will be installed in the local Maven Repository

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `noProvisioningModelName`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--outputfolder"></a>

### <outputFolder>

The folder that will contain the created Feature Models relative to the Maven Basedir Folder

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **User Property**: `outputFolder`
- **Default**: `target/features`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--runmodes"></a>

### <runModes>

List of all Runmodes that are considered for this conversion The default and all parts of all runmodes listed are placed into the Feature Models, all others are excluded

- **Type**: `java.util.List<java.lang.String>`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `runModes`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo--version"></a>

### <version>

If provided this becomes the Feature's Version

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `version`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin/help-mojo.html -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--sling-feature-converter:help"></a>

# sling-feature-converter:help

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin:1.0.12:help

**Description**:

Display help information on sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin.
Call `mvn sling-feature-converter:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name>` to display parameter details.

**Attributes**:

- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<detail>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--detail) | `boolean` | `-` | If `true`, display all settable properties for each goal. **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `detail` |
| [`<goal>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--goal) | `String` | `-` | The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed. **User Property**: `goal` |
| [`<indentSize>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--indentsize) | `int` | `-` | The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive. **Default**: `2` **User Property**: `indentSize` |
| [`<lineLength>`](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--linelength) | `int` | `-` | The maximum length of a display line, should be positive. **Default**: `80` **User Property**: `lineLength` |

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--detail"></a>

### <detail>

If `true`, display all settable properties for each goal.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `detail`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--goal"></a>

### <goal>

The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `goal`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--indentsize"></a>

### <indentSize>

The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `indentSize`
- **Default**: `2`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo--linelength"></a>

### <lineLength>

The maximum length of a display line, should be positive.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `lineLength`
- **Default**: `80`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin--content-package-to-feature-model-maven-plugin"></a>

# Content Package to Feature Model Maven Plugin

Maven Plugin to Convert Configuration Files and Packages to Feature Models

See [Goals](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info) for a list of supported goals.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin--usage"></a>

### Usage

A nearly complete usage of conversion, building and launching a feature
model based project can be found at [usage](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-usage) page.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin/plugin-info.html -->

<!-- page_index: 232 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info--plugin-documentation"></a>

# Plugin Documentation

This report describes goals, parameters details, requirements and sample usage of this plugin.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info--goals"></a>

## Goals

Goals available for this plugin:

| Goal | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [sling-feature-converter:convert-cp](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-cp-mojo) | Converts the given Content Packages into Feature Models and places the converted Content Package into the local Maven Repository |
| [sling-feature-converter:convert-pm](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-convert-pm-mojo) | Converts the given list of Provisioning Models into Feature Models |
| [sling-feature-converter:help](#components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-help-mojo) | Display help information on sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin. Call `mvn sling-feature-converter:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name>` to display parameter details. |

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info--system-requirements"></a>

## System Requirements

The following specifies the minimum requirements to run this Maven plugin:

Maven

3.8.1

JDK

11

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info--system-requirements-history"></a>

## System Requirements History

The following specifies the minimum requirements to run this Maven plugin for historical versions:

| Plugin Version | Maven | JDK |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1.0.12 | - | 11 |
| from 1.0.4 to 1.0.10 | - | 8 |

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-plugin-info--usage"></a>

## Usage

You should specify the version in your project's plugin configuration:

```
<project>
  ...
  <build>
    <!-- To define the plugin version in your parent POM -->
    <pluginManagement>
      <plugins>
        <plugin>
          <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
          <artifactId>sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin</artifactId>
          <version>1.0.12</version>
        </plugin>
        ...
      </plugins>
    </pluginManagement>
    <!-- To use the plugin goals in your POM or parent POM -->
    <plugins>
      <plugin>
        <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
        <artifactId>sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin</artifactId>
      </plugin>
      ...
    </plugins>
  </build>
  ...
</project>
```

For more information, see ["Guide to Configuring Plug-ins"](https://maven.apache.org/guides/mini/guide-configuring-plugins.html)

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-scm--overview"></a>

# Overview

This project uses [Git](https://git-scm.com/) to manage its source code. Instructions on Git use can be found at <https://git-scm.com/doc>.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-scm--web-browser-access"></a>

# Web Browser Access

The following is a link to a browsable version of the source repository:

```
https://github.com/apache/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin.git
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-scm--anonymous-access"></a>

# Anonymous Access

The source can be checked out anonymously from Git with this command (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>):

```
$ git clone https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin.git
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-scm--developer-access"></a>

# Developer Access

Only project developers can access the Git tree via this method (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>).

```
$ git clone https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin.git
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-scm--access-from-behind-a-firewall"></a>

# Access from Behind a Firewall

Refer to the documentation of the SCM used for more information about access behind a firewall.

# Project Team

A successful project requires many people to play many roles. Some members write code or documentation, while others are valuable as testers, submitting patches and suggestions.

The project team is comprised of Members and Contributors. Members have direct access to the source of a project and actively evolve the code-base. Contributors improve the project through submission of patches and suggestions to the Members. The number of Contributors to the project is unbounded. Get involved today. All contributions to the project are greatly appreciated.

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-usage"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin/usage.html -->

<!-- page_index: 236 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-usage--usage"></a>

## Usage

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-usage--converting-sling-project-content-packages-and-launch-it"></a>

### Converting Sling, Project Content Packages and Launch it

> [!NOTE]
> : In this sample we use Maven variables like **project.groupId** instead of a static value assuming
> that the project is within the same project that creates the content packages. Adjust that as needed.
> **Note**: Because we generate Feature Model files here the feature model files are in **target/fm**. We use **fm**
> instead of **features** to avoid confusion with the default feature source of **src/main/features**.

First we need to define the Content Packages that are converted

```
<dependencies>
...
    <dependency>
        <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
        <artifactId>my-content-package</artifactId>
        <version>${project.version}</version>
        <type>zip</type>
    </dependency>
```

Then we need to include the JCR Package Init to deploy the packages when
the project is launched:

```
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
        <artifactId>org.apache.sling.jcr.packageinit</artifactId>
        <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
    </dependency>
...
</dependencies>
```

Then we need to include the package init feature model file which must
here is placed in the **src/main/resouces/fm** folder named **sling\_packageinit.json**:

```
{"id":"${project.groupId}:${project.artifactId}:slingfeature:sling_packageinit:${project.version}","variables":{},"bundles":[{"id":"org.apache.sling:org.apache.sling.jcr.packageinit:0.0.1-SNAPSHOT","start-level":"10"}]}
```

We need to cpy this file into our target folder because this is not a regular JAR build
and so the copy of the resources is not done automatically:

```
<build>
...
    <plugins>
        <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
            <artifactId>maven-resources-plugin</artifactId>
            <version>3.1.0</version>
            <configuration>
                <outputDirectory>${project.build.directory}</outputDirectory>
                <resources>
                    <resource>
                        <directory>src/main/resources</directory>
                    </resource>
                </resources>
            </configuration>
            <executions>
                <execution>
                    <id>copy-frm-resource</id>
                    <phase>process-resources</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>copy-resources</goal>
                    </goals>
                </execution>
            </executions>
        </plugin>
```

Then we need to setup the Sling Feature Converter Maven Plugin to convert Sling into its Feature Model
equivalent so that we can launch it together with the converter CP packages later:

```
         <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
            <artifactId>sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            <version>1.0.12</version>
            <extensions>true</extensions>
            <executions>
                <execution>
                    <id>convert-pm</id>
                    <phase>process-classes</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>convert-pm</goal>
                    </goals>
                    <configuration>
                        <inputFolder>src/main/resources/sling/provisioning</inputFolder>
                        <outputFolder>target/fm</outputFolder>
                        <groupId>${{project.groupId}}</groupId>
                        <artifactId>${{project.artifactId}}</artifactId>
                        <version>${{project.version}}</version>
                        <frameworkProperties>
                            launchpad:felix.systempackages.substitution=true,
                            launchpad:felix.systempackages.calculate.uses=true
                        </frameworkProperties>
                        <excludeBundles>
                            org.apache.sling.launchpad.installer,
                            org.apache.sling.jcr.repoinit.impl.RepositoryInitializer
                        </excludeBundles>
                        <runModes>
                            oak_tar,
                            :standalone
                        </runModes>
                    </configuration>
                </execution>
```

In this scenario the Sling Provisioning Models are copied into the source folder.
The **Launchpad Installer** and the **Repository Initializer** do not work together with Sling FM so
they are excluded here. Then we select **oak\_tar and :standalone** as the runmodes for this instance.

Then we convert the Content Package:

```
                <execution>
                    <id>convert-cp</id>
                    <phase>process-classes</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>convert-cp</goal>
                    </goals>
                    <configuration>
                        <!-- NOTE: ${{ / }} is a way to encode placeholders that should not be interpolated in Maven in this call
                                   and ${{{ / }}} is used to make it a CP Conversion Placeholder -->
                        <artifactIdOverride>${{project.groupId}}:${{project.artifactId}}:slingosgifeature:${{{filename}}}:${{project.version}}</artifactIdOverride>
                        <installConvertedCP>true</installConvertedCP>
                        <!-- Attention: because of the hack to deal with the overrides in the local Repo the generated files must be placed locally and not in the local Maven repo -->
                        <convertedCPOutput>${project.build.directory}/fm.out</convertedCPOutput>
                        <fmOutput>${project.build.directory}/fm</fmOutput>
                        <fmPrefix>test-ui-apps-</fmPrefix>
                        <contentPackages>
                            <contentPackage>
                                <groupId>org.apache.sling.test</groupId>
                                <artifactId>ui.apps</artifactId>
                            </contentPackage>
                        </contentPackages>
                    </configuration>
                </execution>
            </executions>
        </plugin>
```

Here we override the Feature Id to a more generic version, mark that we want to intall the converted files into
our local Maven repo and that we prefix the converted FM file with **test-ui-apps-**.

Now we setup this Plugin and set the features folder to **target/fm** (keep in mind this path has to
be relative to the basedir and cannot be absolute):

```
        <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
            <artifactId>slingfeature-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            <version>1.1.12</version>
            <extensions>true</extensions>
            <configuration>
                <features>target/fm</features>
            </configuration>
```

Now we can aggregate, collect them into a single FM file (attach) and verify all the generated Feature Model files:

```
                <execution>
                    <id>aggregate-base-feature</id>
                    <phase>generate-test-sources</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>aggregate-features</goal>
                        <generatedFeatures>${basedir}/target/fm</generatedFeatures>
                    </goals>
                    <configuration>
                        <aggregates>
                            <aggregate>
                                <classifier>example-runtime</classifier>
                                <filesInclude>**/*.json</filesInclude>
                            </aggregate>
                        </aggregates>
                    </configuration>
                </execution>
                <execution>
                    <id>attach-base-feature</id>
                    <phase>process-test-sources</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>attach-features</goal>
                    </goals>
                </execution>
                <execution>
                    <id>verify-analyze</id>
                    <phase>generate-test-resources</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>analyse-features</goal>
                    </goals>
                    <configuration>
                        <framework>
                            <groupId>org.apache.felix</groupId>
                            <artifactId>org.apache.felix.framework</artifactId>
                            <version>6.0.1</version>
                        </framework>
                        <scans>
                            <scan>
                                <includeClassifier>example-runtime</includeClassifier>
                                <includeTasks>
                                    <includeTask>bundle-packages</includeTask>
                                </includeTasks>
                            </scan>
                        </scans>
                    </configuration>
                </execution>
            </executions>
        </plugin>
...
    </plugins>
</build>
```

Finally we can define a profile to launch the Feature Model based project. With that the launch is only done
if the project is buil with goal **install** and profile **launch** (mvn install -P launch):

```
<profiles>
    <profile>
        <id>launch</id>
        <build>
            <plugins>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
                    <artifactId>slingfeature-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>1.1.12</version>
                    <extensions>true</extensions>
                        <dependencies>
                            <!-- For now the Extension Content has to be placed ahead of the launcher to make CP
                                 deployment work (see SLING-8483) -->
                            <dependency>
                                <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
                                <artifactId>org.apache.sling.feature.extension.content</artifactId>
                                <version>1.0.5-SNAPSHOT</version>
                            </dependency>
                            <dependency>
                                <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
                                <artifactId>org.apache.sling.feature.launcher</artifactId>
                                <version>1.1.0</version>
                            </dependency>
                        </dependencies>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>launch-it</id>
                                <phase>install</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>launch-features</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <selection>
                                        <includeClassifier>example-runtime</includeClassifier>
                                    </selection>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                </plugin>
            </plugins>
        </build>
    </profile>
</profiles>
```

The execution of a conversion and launch would look like this:

```
mvn \
    clean \
    install \
    -P launch
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin-usage--converting-a-content-package-and-install-its-feature-model-descriptor"></a>

### Converting a Content Package and Install its Feature Model Descriptor

Instead of building everything local in a dedicated Maven module now each Content Project Module
can install their generated Feature Module descriptor into the local Maven repository so that it
can be **included as artifact** when the FM project is assembled.

First in each Content Package module add this plugin configuration to your POM in the **build** section:

```
<plugin>
    <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
    <artifactId>sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin</artifactId>
    <version>${sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin.version}</version>
    <extensions>true</extensions>
    <executions>
        <execution>
            <id>convert-cp</id>
            <phase>verify</phase>
            <goals>
                <goal>convert-cp</goal>
            </goals>
            <configuration>
                <artifactIdOverride>${project.groupId}:${project.artifactId}:slingosgifeature:${{{filename}}}:${project.version}</artifactIdOverride>
                <installConvertedCP>true</installConvertedCP>
                <convertedCPOutput>${project.build.directory}/fm.out</convertedCPOutput>
                <fmOutput>${project.build.directory}/fm</fmOutput>
                <fmPrefix>peregrine-</fmPrefix>
                <isContentPackage>true</isContentPackage>
                <contentPackages>
                    <contentPackage>
                        <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
                        <artifactId>${project.artifactId}</artifactId>
                    </contentPackage>
                </contentPackages>
            </configuration>
        </execution>
    </executions>
</plugin>
```

- **sling-feature-converter-maven-plugin.version**: is a property with the version of this plugin to be used (1.0.2 for now)
- **artifactIdOverride**: This should match the Maven Id with this pattern: ‘groupId’:‘artifactId’:‘type fixed to slingosgifeature’:‘classifier’:‘version’
- **installConvertedCP**: must be set to true otherwise I cannot be assembled later
- **convertedCPOutput/fmOutput/fmPrefix**: adjust to your preferences
- **isContentPackage**: must be set to true
- **contentPackage**: must match the module's properties (later we might remove this)

After a successful build one can check the installation by going to your local Maven repository, got to the location of you artifact and
check if there is a file with the extension **slingosgifeature**.

Now we can go to the Assembly part and add the FM installed locally as artifact:

```
<plugin>
    <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
    <artifactId>slingfeature-maven-plugin</artifactId>
    <version>${slingfeature-maven-plugin.version}</version>
    <extensions>true</extensions>
    <configuration>
        <features>target/fm</features>
        <generatedFeatures>${basedir}/target/fm</generatedFeatures>
    </configuration>
    <executions>
        <execution>
            <id>aggregate-base-feature</id>
            <phase>generate-test-sources</phase>
            <goals>
                <goal>aggregate-features</goal>
            </goals>
            <configuration>
                <aggregates>
                    <aggregate>
                        <classifier>example-runtime</classifier>
                        <filesInclude>**/*.json</filesInclude>
                        <configurationOverrides>*=USE_LATEST</configurationOverrides>
                        <includeArtifact>
                            <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
                            <artifactId>base.ui.apps</artifactId>
                            <version>1.0.12</version>
                            <classifier>base.ui.apps</classifier>
                            <type>slingosgifeature</type>
                        </includeArtifact>
                        ...
                    </aggregate>
                </aggregates>
            </configuration>
        </execution>
    </executions>
</plugin>
```

- **slingfeature-maven-plugin.version**: version of the sling feature maven plugin to be used
- **features/generatedFeatures**: add/set depending on your project
- **classifier/filesInclude/configurationOverrides**: set depending on your project
- **includeArtifact**: one entry per Content Package FM. The **groupId**, **artifactId**, **version** and **classifier**
  must match your FM descriptor

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-ci-management"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/ci-management.html -->

<!-- page_index: 242 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-ci-management--overview"></a>

# Overview

This project uses [Jenkins](https://www.jenkins.io/).

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-ci-management--access"></a>

# Access

The following is a link to the continuous integration system used by the project:

```
https://ci-builds.apache.org/job/Sling/
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-ci-management--notifiers"></a>

# Notifiers

No notifiers are defined. Please check back at a later date.

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/help-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 243 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--feature-launcher:help"></a>

# feature-launcher:help

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:feature-launcher-maven-plugin:1.0.4:help

**Description**:

Display help information on feature-launcher-maven-plugin.
Call `mvn feature-launcher:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name>` to display parameter details.

**Attributes**:

- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<detail>`](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--detail) | `boolean` | `-` | If `true`, display all settable properties for each goal. **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `detail` |
| [`<goal>`](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--goal) | `String` | `-` | The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed. **User Property**: `goal` |
| [`<indentSize>`](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--indentsize) | `int` | `-` | The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive. **Default**: `2` **User Property**: `indentSize` |
| [`<lineLength>`](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--linelength) | `int` | `-` | The maximum length of a display line, should be positive. **Default**: `80` **User Property**: `lineLength` |

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--detail"></a>

### <detail>

If `true`, display all settable properties for each goal.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `detail`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--goal"></a>

### <goal>

The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `goal`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--indentsize"></a>

### <indentSize>

The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `indentSize`
- **Default**: `2`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo--linelength"></a>

### <lineLength>

The maximum length of a display line, should be positive.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `lineLength`
- **Default**: `80`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/ -->

<!-- page_index: 244 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin--sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin"></a>

# Sling Feature Launcher Maven Plugin

The Sling Feature Launcher Maven Plugin can start and stop existing [Sling Features](#documentation-development-feature-model).
It leverages the [Sling Feature Launcher](https://github.com/apache/sling-org-apache-sling-feature-launcher).

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin--example-usage"></a>

## Example Usage

```xml
<plugin>
    <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
    <artifactId>feature-launcher-maven-plugin</artifactId>
    <configuration>
        <launches>
            <launch>
                <id>model</id>
                <!-- optionally uncomment to skip this launch if the skip property resolves to false -->
                <!--
                <skip>${prop1.skip}</skip>
                -->
                <feature>
                    <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
                    <artifactId>org.apache.sling.starter</artifactId>
                    <version>12</version>
                    <classifier>oak_tar</classifier>
                    <type>slingosgifeature</type>
                </feature>
                <launcherArguments>
                    <!-- optionally uncomment to pass any required extra vm options -->
                    <!--
                    <vmOptions>
                        <value>-Xmx512m</value>
                        <value>-agentlib:jdwp=transport=dt_socket,server=y,suspend=n,address=5000</value>
                    </vmOptions>
                    -->
                    <frameworkProperties>
                        <org.osgi.service.http.port>8080</org.osgi.service.http.port>
                    </frameworkProperties>
                    <!-- Feature launcher variables can be set like this -->
                    <variables>
                        <TEST_VARIABLE>TEST_VALUE</TEST_VARIABLE>
                    </variables>
                </launcherArguments>
                <startTimeoutSeconds>180</startTimeoutSeconds>
            </launch>
        </launches>
    </configuration>
    <executions>
        <execution>
            <goals>
                <goal>start</goal>
                <goal>stop</goal>
            </goals>
        </execution>
    </executions>
</plugin>
```

See [Goals](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info) for a list of supported goals.

---

| Apache Sling Development List | [Subscribe](mailto:dev-subscribe@sling.apache.org) | [Unsubscribe](mailto:dev-unsubscribe@sling.apache.org) | [Post](#project-information--mailing-lists) | [lists.apache.org](https://lists.apache.org/list.html?dev@sling.apache.org) | [www.mail-archive.com](https://www.mail-archive.com/dev@sling.apache.org/) |
| Apache Sling Source Control List | [Subscribe](mailto:commits-subscribe@sling.apache.org) | [Unsubscribe](mailto:commits-unsubscribe@sling.apache.org) | - | [mail-archives.apache.org](https://mail-archives.apache.org/mod_mbox/sling-commits/) | [sling-commits.markmail.org](https://sling-commits.markmail.org/) |

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/plugin-info.html -->

<!-- page_index: 246 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info--plugin-documentation"></a>

# Plugin Documentation

This report describes goals, parameters details, requirements and sample usage of this plugin.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info--goals"></a>

## Goals

Goals available for this plugin:

| Goal | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [feature-launcher:help](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-help-mojo) | Display help information on feature-launcher-maven-plugin. Call `mvn feature-launcher:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name>` to display parameter details. |
| [feature-launcher:start](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo) | Start one or multiple [Sling Feature(s)](#documentation-development-feature-model). |
| [feature-launcher:stop](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo) | Stop one or multiple [Sling Feature(s)](#documentation-development-feature-model). |

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info--system-requirements"></a>

## System Requirements

The following specifies the minimum requirements to run this Maven plugin:

Maven

3.8.1

JDK

11

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info--system-requirements-history"></a>

## System Requirements History

The following specifies the minimum requirements to run this Maven plugin for historical versions:

| Plugin Version | Maven | JDK |
| --- | --- | --- |
| from 1.0.0 to 1.0.4 | 3.8.1 | 11 |
| 0.1.10 | 3.8.1 | 8 |
| from 0.1.0 to 0.1.8 | 3.3.9 | 8 |

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-plugin-info--usage"></a>

## Usage

You should specify the version in your project's plugin configuration:

```
<project>
  ...
  <build>
    <!-- To define the plugin version in your parent POM -->
    <pluginManagement>
      <plugins>
        <plugin>
          <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
          <artifactId>feature-launcher-maven-plugin</artifactId>
          <version>1.0.4</version>
        </plugin>
        ...
      </plugins>
    </pluginManagement>
    <!-- To use the plugin goals in your POM or parent POM -->
    <plugins>
      <plugin>
        <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
        <artifactId>feature-launcher-maven-plugin</artifactId>
      </plugin>
      ...
    </plugins>
  </build>
  ...
</project>
```

For more information, see ["Guide to Configuring Plug-ins"](https://maven.apache.org/guides/mini/guide-configuring-plugins.html)

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-scm--overview"></a>

# Overview

This project uses [Git](https://git-scm.com/) to manage its source code. Instructions on Git use can be found at <https://git-scm.com/doc>.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-scm--web-browser-access"></a>

# Web Browser Access

The following is a link to a browsable version of the source repository:

```
https://github.com/apache/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/tree/feature-launcher-maven-plugin-1.0.4
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-scm--anonymous-access"></a>

# Anonymous Access

The source can be checked out anonymously from Git with this command (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>):

```
$ git clone --branch feature-launcher-maven-plugin-1.0.4 https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin.git
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-scm--developer-access"></a>

# Developer Access

Only project developers can access the Git tree via this method (See <https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone>).

```
$ git clone --branch feature-launcher-maven-plugin-1.0.4 https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin.git
```

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-scm--access-from-behind-a-firewall"></a>

# Access from Behind a Firewall

Refer to the documentation of the SCM used for more information about access behind a firewall.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/start-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 248 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--feature-launcher:start"></a>

# feature-launcher:start

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:feature-launcher-maven-plugin:1.0.4:start

**Description**:

Start one or multiple [Sling Feature(s)](#documentation-development-feature-model).

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- The goal is not marked as thread-safe and thus does not support parallel builds.
- Binds by default to the [lifecycle phase](https://maven.apache.org/ref/current/maven-core/lifecycles.html): `pre-integration-test`.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

<table class="table table-striped">
<tr>
<th>Name</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Since</th>
<th>Description</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--attachedartifactsdirectory"><code>&lt;attachedArtifactsDirectory&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><code>File</code></td>
<td><code>-</code></td>
<td>Directory to temporarily store attached artifacts of the current build in to pass them over to the launcher.
<strong>Default</strong>: <code>${project.build.directory}/featureLauncherAttachedArtifacts</code>
<strong>User Property</strong>: <code>attachedArtifactsDirectory</code></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--featurelauncherversion"><code>&lt;featureLauncherVersion&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><code>String</code></td>
<td><code>-</code></td>
<td>The version of the <a href="https://github.com/apache/sling-org-apache-sling-feature-launcher">Sling Feature Launcher</a> to use.
<strong>Default</strong>: <code>1.3.4</code></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--launches"><code>&lt;launches&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><a href="https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html"><code>List&lt;Launch&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><code>-</code></td>
<td>List of <a href="https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html"><code>Launch</code></a> objects to start. Each is having the following format:
<pre><code>
&lt;id&gt;...&lt;/id&gt; &lt;!-- the id of the launch, must be unique within the list, is mandatory--&gt;
&lt;feature&gt;...&lt;/feature&gt; &lt;!-- the Maven coordinates of the feature model, mandatory unless featureFile is used  --&gt;
&lt;featureFile&gt;...&lt;/featureFile&gt; &lt;!-- the path to the feature model, mandatory unless feature is used --&gt;
&lt;launcherArguments&gt; &lt;!-- additional arguments to pass to the launcher --&gt;
  &lt;frameworkProperties&gt;
    &lt;org.osgi.service.http.port&gt;8090&lt;/org.osgi.service.http.port&gt;
  &lt;/framweworkProperties&gt;
  ..
&lt;/launcherArguments&gt;
&lt;repositoryUrls&gt;
   &lt;repositoryUrl&gt;file://.../artifacts&lt;/repositoryUrl&gt;
   &lt;repositoryUrl&gt;https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/&lt;/repositoryUrl&gt;
&lt;/repositoryUrls&gt;
&lt;environmentVariables&gt;&lt;!--additional environment variables to pass to the launcher --&gt;
 &lt;JAVA_HOME&gt;...&lt;/JAVA_HOME&gt;
&lt;/environmentVariables&gt;</code>
</pre>
<p>If no repository URLs are configured the following defaults are used, in order:</p>
<ul>
<li>The local Maven repository</li>
<li>The Maven Central repository</li>
<li>The Apache Snapshots repository</li>
</ul>
<p></p></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--outputdirectory"><code>&lt;outputDirectory&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><code>File</code></td>
<td><code>-</code></td>
<td>The directory in which the features are launched (below its child directory <code>launchers/&lt;launch-id&gt;</code>).
<strong>Default</strong>: <code>${project.build.directory}</code>
<strong>User Property</strong>: <code>outputDir</code></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--trackprocess"><code>&lt;trackProcess&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td><code>-</code></td>
<td>Whether to track the Sling instance process and forcibly stop it when the build ends, when it was not stopped properly.
<strong>Default</strong>: <code>true</code></td></tr></table>

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--attachedartifactsdirectory"></a>

### <attachedArtifactsDirectory>

Directory to temporarily store attached artifacts of the current build in to pass them over to the launcher.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **User Property**: `attachedArtifactsDirectory`
- **Default**: `${project.build.directory}/featureLauncherAttachedArtifacts`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--featurelauncherversion"></a>

### <featureLauncherVersion>

The version of the [Sling Feature Launcher](https://github.com/apache/sling-org-apache-sling-feature-launcher) to use.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `1.3.4`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--launches"></a>

### <launches>

List of [`Launch`](https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html) objects to start. Each is having the following format:

```

<id>...</id> <!-- the id of the launch, must be unique within the list, is mandatory-->
<feature>...</feature> <!-- the Maven coordinates of the feature model, mandatory unless featureFile is used  -->
<featureFile>...</featureFile> <!-- the path to the feature model, mandatory unless feature is used -->
<launcherArguments> <!-- additional arguments to pass to the launcher -->
  <frameworkProperties>
    <org.osgi.service.http.port>8090</org.osgi.service.http.port>
  </framweworkProperties>
  ..
</launcherArguments>
<repositoryUrls>
   <repositoryUrl>file://.../artifacts</repositoryUrl>
   <repositoryUrl>https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/</repositoryUrl>
</repositoryUrls>
<environmentVariables><!--additional environment variables to pass to the launcher -->
 <JAVA_HOME>...</JAVA_HOME>
</environmentVariables>
```

If no repository URLs are configured the following defaults are used, in order:

- The local Maven repository
- The Maven Central repository
- The Apache Snapshots repository

- **Type**: [`java.util.List<org.apache.sling.maven.feature.launcher.Launch>`](https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html)
- **Required**: `Yes`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--outputdirectory"></a>

### <outputDirectory>

The directory in which the features are launched (below its child directory `launchers/<launch-id>`).

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **User Property**: `outputDir`
- **Default**: `${project.build.directory}`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-start-mojo--trackprocess"></a>

### <trackProcess>

Whether to track the Sling instance process and forcibly stop it when the build ends, when it was not stopped properly.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/stop-mojo.html -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--feature-launcher:stop"></a>

# feature-launcher:stop

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:feature-launcher-maven-plugin:1.0.4:stop

**Description**:

Stop one or multiple [Sling Feature(s)](#documentation-development-feature-model).

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- The goal is not marked as thread-safe and thus does not support parallel builds.
- Binds by default to the [lifecycle phase](https://maven.apache.org/ref/current/maven-core/lifecycles.html): `post-integration-test`.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

<table class="table table-striped">
<tr>
<th>Name</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Since</th>
<th>Description</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--launches"><code>&lt;launches&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><a href="https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html"><code>List&lt;Launch&gt;</code></a></td>
<td><code>-</code></td>
<td>List of <a href="https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html"><code>Launch</code></a> objects to start. Each is having the following format:
<pre><code>
&lt;id&gt;...&lt;/id&gt; &lt;!-- the id of the launch, must be unique within the list, is mandatory --&gt;
&lt;dependency&gt;...&lt;/dependency&gt; &lt;!-- the Maven coordinates of the feature model --&gt;
&lt;launcherArguments&gt; &lt;!-- additional arguments to pass to the launcher --&gt;
  &lt;frameworkProperties&gt;
    &lt;org.osgi.service.http.port&gt;8090&lt;/org.osgi.service.http.port&gt;
  &lt;/framweworkProperties&gt;
  ..
&lt;/launcherArguments&gt;
&lt;environmentVariables&gt;&lt;!--additional environment variables to pass to the launcher --&gt;
 &lt;JAVA_HOME&gt;...&lt;/JAVA_HOME&gt;
&lt;/environmentVariables&gt;</code>
</pre></td></tr></table>

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<waitForInput>`](#components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--waitforinput) | `boolean` | `-` | If `true` stopping the server is deferred until you press the Enter key on the terminal on which Maven is executed. **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `feature-launcher.waitForInput` |

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--launches"></a>

### <launches>

List of [`Launch`](https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html) objects to start. Each is having the following format:

```

<id>...</id> <!-- the id of the launch, must be unique within the list, is mandatory -->
<dependency>...</dependency> <!-- the Maven coordinates of the feature model -->
<launcherArguments> <!-- additional arguments to pass to the launcher -->
  <frameworkProperties>
    <org.osgi.service.http.port>8090</org.osgi.service.http.port>
  </framweworkProperties>
  ..
</launcherArguments>
<environmentVariables><!--additional environment variables to pass to the launcher -->
 <JAVA_HOME>...</JAVA_HOME>
</environmentVariables>
```

- **Type**: [`java.util.List<org.apache.sling.maven.feature.launcher.Launch>`](https://sling.apache.org/components/sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/maven/feature/launcher/Launch.html)
- **Required**: `Yes`

---

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-stop-mojo--waitforinput"></a>

### <waitForInput>

If `true` stopping the server is deferred until you press the Enter key on the terminal on which Maven is executed.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `feature-launcher.waitForInput`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<!-- page_index: 251 -->

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-team--project-team"></a>

# Project Team

A successful project requires many people to play many roles. Some members write code or documentation, while others are valuable as testers, submitting patches and suggestions.

The project team is comprised of Members and Contributors. Members have direct access to the source of a project and actively evolve the code-base. Contributors improve the project through submission of patches and suggestions to the Members. The number of Contributors to the project is unbounded. Get involved today. All contributions to the project are greatly appreciated.

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-team--members"></a>

## Members

The following is a list of developers with commit privileges that have directly contributed to the project in one way or another.

| Id | Name | URL |
| --- | --- | --- |
| sling | Apache Sling Project | <https://sling.apache.org/site/project-team.html> |

<a id="components-sling-feature-launcher-maven-plugin-team--contributors"></a>

## Contributors

There are no contributors listed for this project. Please check back again later.
