### <enableProjectVariableReplacement>

Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion".

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--features"></a>

### <features>

Directory containing feature files

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/main/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--featuresexcludes"></a>

### <featuresExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--featuresincludes"></a>

### <featuresIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--generatedfeatures"></a>

### <generatedFeatures>

Directory containing generated feature files

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <generatedFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <generatedFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--jarstartorder"></a>

### <jarStartOrder>

The start level for the attached jar/bundle.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--replacepropertyvariables"></a>

### <replacePropertyVariables>

A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--resourcespath"></a>

### <resourcesPath>

Path where the features are embedded in the target/classes directory.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `META-INF/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies"></a>

### <skipAddFeatureDependencies>

If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--skipaddjartofeature"></a>

### <skipAddJarToFeature>

If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature"></a>

### <skipAddJarToTestFeature>

If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies"></a>

### <skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>

If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--testfeatures"></a>

### <testFeatures>

Directory containing test feature files.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/test/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--testfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo--validatefeatures"></a>

### <validateFeatures>

If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--slingfeature:extract-extension"></a>

# slingfeature:extract-extension

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:extract-extension

**Description**:

No description.

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.
- Binds by default to the [lifecycle phase](https://maven.apache.org/ref/current/maven-core/lifecycles.html): `package`.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<extension>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--extension) | `String` | `-` | No description. |
| [`<features>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--features) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing feature files **Default**: `src/main/features` |
| [`<outputDir>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--outputdir) | `String` | `-` | No description. |
| [`<selection>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--selection) | [`FeatureSelectionConfig`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/FeatureSelectionConfig.html) | `-` | No description. |
| [`<testFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--testfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing test feature files. **Default**: `src/test/features` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<defaultMetadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--defaultmetadata) | `Map<...>` | `-` | This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor |

If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<enableProjectVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion". **Default**: `true` |
| [`<featuresExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--featuresexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<featuresIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--featuresincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<generatedFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--generatedfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing generated feature files |

| [`<generatedFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<jarStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--jarstartorder) | `int` | `-` | The start level for the attached jar/bundle. |
| [`<replacePropertyVariables>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--replacepropertyvariables) | `String` | `1.3.6` | A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties. |
| [`<skipAddFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--skipaddjartofeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToTestFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<testFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the test features. |
| [`<testFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--testfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the test features. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<validateFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--validatefeatures) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema. **Default**: `true` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--defaultmetadata"></a>

### <defaultMetadata>

This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor

- **Type**: `java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>>`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement"></a>

### <enableLegacyVariableReplacement>

Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement"></a>

### <enableProjectVariableReplacement>

Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion".

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

### <extension>

No description.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `Yes`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--slingfeature:features-diff"></a>

# slingfeature:features-diff

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:features-diff

**Description**:

Compares different versions of the same Feature Model.

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- Requires dependency resolution of artifacts in scope: `test`.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.
- Binds by default to the [lifecycle phase](https://maven.apache.org/ref/current/maven-core/lifecycles.html): `package`.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<features>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--features) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing feature files **Default**: `src/main/features` |
| [`<testFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--testfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing test feature files. **Default**: `src/test/features` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<comparisonVersion>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--comparisonversion) | `String` | `-` | No description. **Default**: `(,${project.version})` |
| [`<defaultMetadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--defaultmetadata) | `Map<...>` | `-` | This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor |
| [`<enableLegacyVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<enableProjectVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion". **Default**: `true` |
| [`<featuresExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--featuresexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<featuresIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--featuresincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<generatedFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--generatedfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing generated feature files |
| [`<generatedFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<generatedFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<jarStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--jarstartorder) | `int` | `-` | The start level for the attached jar/bundle. |
| [`<replacePropertyVariables>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--replacepropertyvariables) | `String` | `1.3.6` | A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties. |
| [`<selection>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--selection) | [`FeatureSelectionConfig`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/FeatureSelectionConfig.html) | `-` | No description. |
| [`<skipAddFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddjartofeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToTestFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<testFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the test features. |
| [`<testFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--testfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the test features. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<validateFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--validatefeatures) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema. **Default**: `true` |

- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddjartofeature"></a>

### <skipAddJarToFeature>

If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature"></a>

### <skipAddJarToTestFeature>

If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies"></a>

### <skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>

If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--testfeatures"></a>

### <testFeatures>

Directory containing test feature files.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/test/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--testfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo--validatefeatures"></a>

### <validateFeatures>

If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo"></a>

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--slingfeature:help"></a>

# slingfeature:help

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:help

**Description**:

Display help information on slingfeature-maven-plugin.
Call `mvn slingfeature:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name>` to display parameter details.

**Attributes**:

- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<detail>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--detail) | `boolean` | `-` | If `true`, display all settable properties for each goal. **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `detail` |
| [`<goal>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--goal) | `String` | `-` | The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed. **User Property**: `goal` |
| [`<indentSize>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--indentsize) | `int` | `-` | The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive. **Default**: `2` **User Property**: `indentSize` |
| [`<lineLength>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--linelength) | `int` | `-` | The maximum length of a display line, should be positive. **Default**: `80` **User Property**: `lineLength` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--detail"></a>

### <detail>

If `true`, display all settable properties for each goal.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `detail`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--goal"></a>

### <goal>

The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `goal`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--indentsize"></a>

### <indentSize>

The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `indentSize`
- **Default**: `2`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo--linelength"></a>

### <lineLength>

The maximum length of a display line, should be positive.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `lineLength`
- **Default**: `80`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/include-artifact-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 290 -->

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--slingfeature:include-artifact"></a>

# slingfeature:include-artifact

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:include-artifact

**Description**:

This goal creates a Feature Model file that includes the Module Artifact as bundle (or extension) so that the Artifact can be added through a FM into a FM project. The FM file can be found in the 'build directory'/slingfeature-tmp folder. After a FM file is created successfully this file will be installed in the local Maven Repository as 'slingosgifeature' file under the Module's Maven Id location (group, artifact, version). This file can then later be used inside the 'aggregate-features' goal with:  `<includeArtifact> <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId> <artifactId>org.apache.sling.test.feature</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <classifier>my-test-classifier</classifier> <type>slingosgifeature</type> </includeArtifact>`  It also can add dependencies to the FM file if its scope is provided (normally that would be 'compile'). In addition a bundle start order can be set for these included dependency bundles. Finally any FM files inside the Source FM folder are embedded into the FM file. This allows to add extension files like 'repoinit' etc to be added to provide them with the module.

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- Requires dependency resolution of artifacts in scope: `compile`.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.
- Binds by default to the [lifecycle phase](https://maven.apache.org/ref/current/maven-core/lifecycles.html): `prepare-package`.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<features>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--features) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing feature files **Default**: `src/main/features` |
| [`<testFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--testfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing test feature files. **Default**: `src/test/features` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<bundlesStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--bundlesstartorder) | `int` | `-` | Start Order of all included Dependencies. **Default**: `-1` **User Property**: `bundleStartOrder` |
| [`<defaultMetadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--defaultmetadata) | `Map<...>` | `-` | This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor |
| [`<enableLegacyVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<enableProjectVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion". **Default**: `true` |
| [`<featuresExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--featuresexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<featuresIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--featuresincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<generatedFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--generatedfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing generated feature files |
| [`<generatedFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<generatedFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<includeArtifactClassifier>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--includeartifactclassifier) | `String` | `-` | Classifier of the feature the current artifact is included in. For simple projects a artifact classifier is not needed but in multi feature projects the classifier is used to find the appropriate feature. **User Property**: `includeArtifactClassifier` |
| [`<includeArtifactExtension>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--includeartifactextension) | `String` | `-` | Name of the extension to include the artifact in. If not specified the artifact is included as a bundle. |
| [`<includeClassifier>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--includeclassifier) | `String` | `1.3.0` | Name of the classifier for the artifact to be included. By default the main artifact (no classifier) will be included. |
| [`<includeDependenciesWithScope>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--includedependencieswithscope) | `String[]` | `-` | All listed dependency's scopes will be added to the descriptor. **User Property**: `includeDependenciesWithScope` |
| [`<includeType>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--includetype) | `String` | `1.3.0` | Name of the type for the artifact to be included. By default the type of the main artifact is used. |
| [`<jarStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--jarstartorder) | `int` | `-` | The start level for the attached jar/bundle. |
| [`<metadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--metadata) | `Map<String,String>` | `-` | Metadata for the included artifact. |
| [`<replacePropertyVariables>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--replacepropertyvariables) | `String` | `1.3.6` | A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties. |
| [`<skipAddFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--skipaddjartofeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToTestFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<testFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the test features. |
| [`<testFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--testfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the test features. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<validateFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--validatefeatures) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema. **Default**: `true` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/info-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 291 -->

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--slingfeature:info"></a>

# slingfeature:info

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:info

**Description**:

Extract information from a feature This mojo does not require a project, it can be run by just pointing it at a feature file. When run from within a project, the normal feature selection mechanism can be used. This mojo supports

- Extracting the exported packages per feature and writing them to a file
- Detecting duplicates across features and writing a report

**Attributes**:

- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.
- Since version: `1.1.20`.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<features>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--features) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing feature files **Default**: `src/main/features` |
| [`<testFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--testfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing test feature files. **Default**: `src/test/features` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<artifactExcludesList>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--artifactexcludeslist) | `String` | `1.2.0` | A comma separated list of artifact patterns to exclude. Follows the pattern "groupId:artifactId:type:classifier:version". Designed to allow specifying the set of excludes from the command line. **User Property**: `excludes` |
| [`<artifactIncludesList>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--artifactincludeslist) | `String` | `1.2.0` | A comma separated list of artifact patterns to include. Follows the pattern "groupId:artifactId:type:classifier:version". Designed to allow specifying the set of includes from the command line. **User Property**: `includes` |
| [`<defaultMetadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--defaultmetadata) | `Map<...>` | `-` | This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor |
| [`<enableLegacyVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<enableProjectVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion". **Default**: `true` |
| [`<featureFile>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--featurefile) | `File` | `-` | **Deprecated.** No reason given No description. **User Property**: `featureFile` |
| [`<featuresExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--featuresexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<featuresIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--featuresincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<generatedFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--generatedfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing generated feature files |
| [`<generatedFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<generatedFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<infoFeatureFiles>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--infofeaturefiles) | `String` | `-` | Select the feature files if run in standalone mode; comma separated list of file names. **User Property**: `infoFeatureFiles` |
| [`<infoFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--infofeatures) | [`FeatureSelectionConfig`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/FeatureSelectionConfig.html) | `-` | Select the features for info generation. |
| [`<jarStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--jarstartorder) | `int` | `-` | The start level for the attached jar/bundle. |
| [`<outputDirectory>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--outputdirectory) | `File` | `-` | If output format is set to file, this can be used to change the output directory. **User Property**: `outputDirectory` |
| [`<outputExportedPackages>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--outputexportedpackages) | `String` | `-` | **Deprecated.** No reason given No description. **User Property**: `outputExportedPackages` |
| [`<outputFormat>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--outputformat) | `String` | `-` | Output format, either file, singlefile or log. **Default**: `file` **User Property**: `outputFormat` |
| [`<replacePropertyVariables>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--replacepropertyvariables) | `String` | `1.3.6` | A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties. |
| [`<reports>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--reports) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of reports. **Default**: `exported-packages` **User Property**: `reports` |
| [`<skipAddFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddjartofeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToTestFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<testFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the test features. |
| [`<testFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--testfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the test features. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<validateFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--validatefeatures) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema. **Default**: `true` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--artifactexcludeslist"></a>

### <artifactExcludesList>

A comma separated list of artifact patterns to exclude. Follows the pattern "groupId:artifactId:type:classifier:version". Designed to allow specifying the set of excludes from the command line.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Since**: `1.2.0`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `excludes`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--artifactincludeslist"></a>

### <artifactIncludesList>

A comma separated list of artifact patterns to include. Follows the pattern "groupId:artifactId:type:classifier:version". Designed to allow specifying the set of includes from the command line.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Since**: `1.2.0`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `includes`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--defaultmetadata"></a>

### <defaultMetadata>

This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor

- **Type**: `java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>>`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement"></a>

### <enableLegacyVariableReplacement>

Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement"></a>

### <enableProjectVariableReplacement>

Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion".

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--featurefile"></a>

### <featureFile>

**Deprecated.** No reason given

No description.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `featureFile`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--features"></a>

### <features>

Directory containing feature files

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/main/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--featuresexcludes"></a>

### <featuresExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--featuresincludes"></a>

### <featuresIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--generatedfeatures"></a>

### <generatedFeatures>

Directory containing generated feature files

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <generatedFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <generatedFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--infofeaturefiles"></a>

### <infoFeatureFiles>

Select the feature files if run in standalone mode; comma separated list of file names.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `infoFeatureFiles`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--infofeatures"></a>

### <infoFeatures>

Select the features for info generation.

- **Type**: [`org.apache.sling.feature.maven.mojos.FeatureSelectionConfig`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/FeatureSelectionConfig.html)
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--jarstartorder"></a>

### <jarStartOrder>

The start level for the attached jar/bundle.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--outputdirectory"></a>

### <outputDirectory>

If output format is set to file, this can be used to change the output directory.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `outputDirectory`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--outputexportedpackages"></a>

### <outputExportedPackages>

**Deprecated.** No reason given

No description.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `outputExportedPackages`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--outputformat"></a>

### <outputFormat>

Output format, either file, singlefile or log.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `outputFormat`
- **Default**: `file`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--replacepropertyvariables"></a>

### <replacePropertyVariables>

A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--reports"></a>

### <reports>

Comma separated list of reports.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `reports`
- **Default**: `exported-packages`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies"></a>

### <skipAddFeatureDependencies>

If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddjartofeature"></a>

### <skipAddJarToFeature>

If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature"></a>

### <skipAddJarToTestFeature>

If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies"></a>

### <skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>

If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--testfeatures"></a>

### <testFeatures>

Directory containing test feature files.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/test/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--testfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo--validatefeatures"></a>

### <validateFeatures>

If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/launch-features-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 292 -->

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--slingfeature:launch-features"></a>

# slingfeature:launch-features

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:launch-features

**Description**:

Launches the given Feature File

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<features>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--features) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing feature files **Default**: `src/main/features` |
| [`<testFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--testfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing test feature files. **Default**: `src/test/features` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<artifactClashOverrides>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--artifactclashoverrides) | `String[]` | `-` | The Artifact Id Overrides (see Feature Launcher for more info) **User Property**: `artifactClashOverrides` |
| [`<cacheDirectory>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--cachedirectory) | `File` | `-` | The path of the folder where the cache is located **User Property**: `cacheDirectory` |
| [`<defaultMetadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--defaultmetadata) | `Map<...>` | `-` | This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor |
| [`<enableLegacyVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<enableProjectVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion". **Default**: `true` |
| [`<extensionConfigurations>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--extensionconfigurations) | `String[]` | `-` | Extension Configurations for the Launcher **User Property**: `extensionConfigurations` |
| [`<featureArchiveClassifiers>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--featurearchiveclassifiers) | `Set<String>` | `-` | Feature Archive Classifiers to be used from this project **User Property**: `featureArchiveClassifiers` |
| [`<featureArchiveFiles>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--featurearchivefiles) | `Set<File>` | `-` | Feature Archive Files **User Property**: `featureArchiveFiles` |
| [`<featureArchiveIds>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--featurearchiveids) | `Set<String>` | `-` | Ids of Feature Archives to be obtained from local Maven repository **User Property**: `featureArchiveIds` |
| [`<featuresExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--featuresexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<featuresIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--featuresincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<frameworkArtifacts>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--frameworkartifacts) | `String[]` | `-` | Framework Artifacts for the Launcher **User Property**: `frameworkArtifacts` |
| [`<frameworkProperties>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--frameworkproperties) | `String[]` | `-` | Framework Properties for the Launcher **User Property**: `frameworkProperties` |
| [`<frameworkVersion>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--frameworkversion) | `String` | `-` | The Framework Version (see Feature Launcher for more info) **User Property**: `frameworkVersion` |
| [`<generatedFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--generatedfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing generated feature files |
| [`<generatedFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<generatedFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<homeDirectory>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--homedirectory) | `File` | `-` | The path of the folder where the launcher home is located **User Property**: `homeDirectory` |
| [`<jarStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--jarstartorder) | `int` | `-` | The start level for the attached jar/bundle. |
| [`<replacePropertyVariables>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--replacepropertyvariables) | `String` | `1.3.6` | A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties. |
| [`<repositoryUrl>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--repositoryurl) | `String` | `-` | The Url for the Repository (see Feature Launcher for more info) **User Property**: `frameworkRepositoryUrl` |
| [`<selection>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--selection) | [`FeatureSelectionConfig`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/FeatureSelectionConfig.html) | `-` | No description. |
| [`<skipAddFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--skipaddjartofeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToTestFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<testFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the test features. |
| [`<testFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--testfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the test features. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<validateFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--validatefeatures) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<variableValues>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--variablevalues) | `String[]` | `-` | Variable Values for the Launcher **User Property**: `variableValues` |
| [`<verbose>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--verbose) | `boolean` | `-` | Framework Properties for the Launcher **Default**: `false` **User Property**: `verbose` |

- **Default**: `false`

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies"></a>

### <skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>

If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--testfeatures"></a>

### <testFeatures>

Directory containing test feature files.

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/test/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--testfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <testFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the test features.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--validatefeatures"></a>

### <validateFeatures>

If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--variablevalues"></a>

### <variableValues>

Variable Values for the Launcher

- **Type**: `java.lang.String[]`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `variableValues`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo--verbose"></a>

### <verbose>

Framework Properties for the Launcher

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Required**: `No`
- **User Property**: `verbose`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-plugin-info"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/plugin-info.html -->

<!-- page_index: 293 -->

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-plugin-info--plugin-documentation"></a>

# Plugin Documentation

This report describes goals, parameters details, requirements and sample usage of this plugin.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-plugin-info--goals"></a>

## Goals

Goals available for this plugin:

<table class="table table-striped">
<tr>
<th>Goal</th>
<th>Description</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-aggregate-features-mojo">slingfeature:aggregate-features</a></td>
<td>Aggregate multiple features into a single one.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-analyse-features-mojo">slingfeature:analyse-features</a></td>
<td>Analyse the feature.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-apis-jar-mojo">slingfeature:apis-jar</a></td>
<td>Generates the APIs JARs for the selected feature files.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-apply-default-config-mojo">slingfeature:apply-default-config</a></td>
<td>This mojo applies default configurations to selected features.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-attach-featurearchives-mojo">slingfeature:attach-featurearchives</a></td>
<td>Create a feature model archive and attach it. An archive is created for each feature of this project</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-attach-features-mojo">slingfeature:attach-features</a></td>
<td>Attach the feature as a project artifact.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-collect-artifacts-mojo">slingfeature:collect-artifacts</a></td>
<td>No description.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-embed-features-mojo">slingfeature:embed-features</a></td>
<td>Embed the features in the resources</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-extract-extension-mojo">slingfeature:extract-extension</a></td>
<td>No description.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-features-diff-mojo">slingfeature:features-diff</a></td>
<td>Compares different versions of the same Feature Model.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-help-mojo">slingfeature:help</a></td>
<td>Display help information on slingfeature-maven-plugin.

 Call <code>mvn slingfeature:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=&lt;goal-name&gt;</code> to display parameter details.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-include-artifact-mojo">slingfeature:include-artifact</a></td>
<td>This goal creates a Feature Model file that includes the Module Artifact as bundle (or extension) so that the Artifact can be added through a FM into a FM project. The FM file can be found in the 'build directory'/slingfeature-tmp folder. After a FM file is created successfully this file will be installed in the local Maven Repository as 'slingosgifeature' file under the Module's Maven Id location (group, artifact, version). This file can then later be used inside the 'aggregate-features' goal with: <code> &lt;includeArtifact&gt; &lt;groupId&gt;org.apache.sling&lt;/groupId&gt; &lt;artifactId&gt;org.apache.sling.test.feature&lt;/artifactId&gt; &lt;version&gt;1.0.0&lt;/version&gt; &lt;classifier&gt;my-test-classifier&lt;/classifier&gt; &lt;type&gt;slingosgifeature&lt;/type&gt; &lt;/includeArtifact&gt; </code> It also can add dependencies to the FM file if its scope is provided (normally that would be 'compile'). In addition a bundle start order can be set for these included dependency bundles. Finally any FM files inside the Source FM folder are embedded into the FM file. This allows to add extension files like 'repoinit' etc to be added to provide them with the module.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-info-mojo">slingfeature:info</a></td>
<td>Extract information from a feature This mojo does not require a project, it can be run by just pointing it at a feature file. When run from within a project, the normal feature selection mechanism can be used. This mojo supports
<ul>
<li>Extracting the exported packages per feature and writing them to a file</li>
<li>Detecting duplicates across features and writing a report</li>
</ul></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-launch-features-mojo">slingfeature:launch-features</a></td>
<td>Launches the given Feature File</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo">slingfeature:repository</a></td>
<td>Create a Maven repository structure from the referenced artifacts in the features.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-update-feature-versions-mojo">slingfeature:update-feature-versions</a></td>
<td>Update the bundles/artifact versions</td></tr></table>

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-plugin-info--system-requirements"></a>

## System Requirements

The following specifies the minimum requirements to run this Maven plugin:

Maven

3.8.1

JDK

11

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-plugin-info--system-requirements-history"></a>

## System Requirements History

The following specifies the minimum requirements to run this Maven plugin for historical versions:

| Plugin Version | Maven | JDK |
| --- | --- | --- |
| from 1.9.0 to 1.9.4 | 3.8.1 | 11 |
| 1.8.4 | - | 11 |
| from 0.8.0 to 1.8.2 | - | 8 |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-plugin-info--usage"></a>

## Usage

You should specify the version in your project's plugin configuration:

```
<project>
  ...
  <build>
    <!-- To define the plugin version in your parent POM -->
    <pluginManagement>
      <plugins>
        <plugin>
          <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
          <artifactId>slingfeature-maven-plugin</artifactId>
          <version>1.9.4</version>
          <extensions>true</extensions>
        </plugin>
        ...
      </plugins>
    </pluginManagement>
    <!-- To use the plugin goals in your POM or parent POM -->
    <plugins>
      <plugin>
        <groupId>org.apache.sling</groupId>
        <artifactId>slingfeature-maven-plugin</artifactId>
      </plugin>
      ...
    </plugins>
  </build>
  ...
</project>
```

For more information, see ["Guide to Configuring Plug-ins"](https://maven.apache.org/guides/mini/guide-configuring-plugins.html)

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/repository-mojo.html -->

<!-- page_index: 294 -->

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--slingfeature:repository"></a>

# slingfeature:repository

**Full name**:

org.apache.sling:slingfeature-maven-plugin:1.9.4:repository

**Description**:

Create a Maven repository structure from the referenced artifacts in the features.

**Attributes**:

- Requires a Maven project to be executed.
- Requires dependency resolution of artifacts in scope: `test`.
- The goal is thread-safe and supports parallel builds.
- Binds by default to the [lifecycle phase](https://maven.apache.org/ref/current/maven-core/lifecycles.html): `package`.

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--required-parameters"></a>

## Required Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<features>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--features) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing feature files **Default**: `src/main/features` |
| [`<testFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--testfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing test feature files. **Default**: `src/test/features` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--optional-parameters"></a>

## Optional Parameters

| Name | Type | Since | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`<defaultMetadata>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--defaultmetadata) | `Map<...>` | `-` | This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor |
| [`<enableLegacyVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<enableProjectVariableReplacement>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement) | `boolean` | `1.3.6` | Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion". **Default**: `true` |
| [`<featuresExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--featuresexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<featuresIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--featuresincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<generatedFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--generatedfeatures) | `File` | `-` | Directory containing generated feature files |
| [`<generatedFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all. |
| [`<generatedFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<jarStartOrder>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--jarstartorder) | `int` | `-` | The start level for the attached jar/bundle. |
| [`<replacePropertyVariables>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--replacepropertyvariables) | `String` | `1.3.6` | A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties. |
| [`<repositories>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--repositories) | [`List<Repository>`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/Repository.html) | `-` | No description. |
| [`<repositoryDir>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--repositorydir) | `String` | `-` | The directory to store the artifacts into. **Default**: `artifacts` **User Property**: `repositoryDir` |
| [`<skipAddFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--skipaddfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`provided` to the project. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--skipaddjartofeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddJarToTestFeature>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--skipaddjartotestfeature) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the main jar artifact is not added to the test feature. **Default**: `false` |
| [`<skipAddTestFeatureDependencies>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--skipaddtestfeaturedependencies) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the artifacts from the test feature are not added as dependencies with scope=`test` to the project. **Default**: `true` |
| [`<testFeaturesExcludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--testfeaturesexcludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of excludes for the test features. |
| [`<testFeaturesIncludes>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--testfeaturesincludes) | `String` | `-` | Comma separated list of includes for the test features. **Default**: `**/*.json` |
| [`<validateFeatures>`](#components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--validatefeatures) | `boolean` | `-` | If set to `true` the features are validated against the JSON schema. **Default**: `true` |

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--parameter-details"></a>

## Parameter Details

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--defaultmetadata"></a>

### <defaultMetadata>

This parameter is only declared to make Maven happy, it is evaluated in the Preprossor

- **Type**: `java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>>`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--enablelegacyvariablereplacement"></a>

### <enableLegacyVariableReplacement>

Enable old variable replacement in feature model based on the full maven project including system variables. If this is enabled, enableProjectVariableReplacement and replacePropertyVariables have no effect.

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `false`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--enableprojectvariablereplacement"></a>

### <enableProjectVariableReplacement>

Enable the replacement of variables when reading a feature model. The supported variables are "project.groupId", "project.artifactId", "project.version" and "project.osgiVersion".

- **Type**: `boolean`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `true`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--features"></a>

### <features>

Directory containing feature files

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `Yes`
- **Default**: `src/main/features`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--featuresexcludes"></a>

### <featuresExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--featuresincludes"></a>

### <featuresIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--generatedfeatures"></a>

### <generatedFeatures>

Directory containing generated feature files

- **Type**: `java.io.File`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--generatedfeaturesexcludes"></a>

### <generatedFeaturesExcludes>

Comma separated list of excludes for the generated feature files. Feature files excluded by this configuration are not processed at all.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--generatedfeaturesincludes"></a>

### <generatedFeaturesIncludes>

Comma separated list of includes for the generated feature files in the configured directory. Only feature files specified by this include are processed.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Required**: `No`
- **Default**: `**/*.json`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--jarstartorder"></a>

### <jarStartOrder>

The start level for the attached jar/bundle.

- **Type**: `int`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--replacepropertyvariables"></a>

### <replacePropertyVariables>

A comma separated list of variables which are replaced when a feature model is read. The value of these variables is fetched from the project properties.

- **Type**: `java.lang.String`
- **Since**: `1.3.6`
- **Required**: `No`

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--repositories"></a>

### <repositories>

No description.

- **Type**: [`java.util.List<org.apache.sling.feature.maven.mojos.Repository>`](https://sling.apache.org/components/slingfeature-maven-plugin/apidocs/org/apache/sling/feature/maven/mojos/Repository.html)

---

<a id="components-slingfeature-maven-plugin-repository-mojo--repositorydir"></a>

The directory to store the artifacts into.
